zones.sun: 20–30° SE/S/SW-facing inclines — warmer, sunnier sun pockets
zones.cool: North-facing inclines — far less direct sun, cooler & shaded
zones.wind: Valley floors / gaps that channel wind
zones.fog: Fog path — ≤200 ft low ground connected to the west coast that marine fog threads east through
zones.fog2: Fog band 200–350 ft — fog laps this far up the slopes, thinning
zones.fog3: Fog band 350–500 ft — fog reaches here only on the windward side
zones.fog4: Fog band 500–1000 ft — fog crests here at most; usually above the fog
